calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Clerides for and with Frank Myers. Michael Freedman for Kevin Darling.

The Court stated that there was not enough to support the nomination of Mr. Meyers. All Counsel presented argument. The Court suggested a professional fiduciary be appointed and took the matter under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
